revision.text: <includeonly><!-- -->{{#if: {{{party|}}} | [[{{{party}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party2|}}} | –[[{{{party2}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party2_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party2_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party3|}}} | –[[{{{party3}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party3_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party3_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party4|}}} | –[[{{{party4}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party4_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party4_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party5|}}} | –[[{{{party5}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party5_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party5_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party6|}}} | –[[{{{party6}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party6_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party6_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>{{Documentation|Template:Officeholder table/doc}} [[Category:Table templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly><!-- -->{{#if: {{{party|}}} | [[{{{party}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party2|}}} | –[[{{{party2}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party2_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party2_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party3|}}} | –[[{{{party3}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party3_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party3_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party4|}}} | –[[{{{party4}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party4_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party4_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party5|}}} | –[[{{{party5}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party5_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party5_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party6|}}} | –[[{{{party6}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party6_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party6_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>{{Documentation|Template:Officeholder table/doc}} [[Category:Table templates]] </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <includeonly><!-- -->{{#if: {{{party|}}} | [[{{{party}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party2|}}} | –[[{{{party2}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party2_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party2_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party3|}}} | –[[{{{party3}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party3_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party3_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party4|}}} | –[[{{{party4}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party4_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party4_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party5|}}} | –[[{{{party5}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party5_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party5_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party6|}}} | –[[{{{party6}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party6_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party6_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>{{Documentation|Template:Officeholder table/doc}} [[Category:Table templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <includeonly><!-- -->{{#if: {{{party|}}} | [[{{{party}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party2|}}} | –[[{{{party2}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party2_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party2_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party3|}}} | –[[{{{party3}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party3_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party3_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party4|}}} | –[[{{{party4}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party4_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party4_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party5|}}} | –[[{{{party5}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party5_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party5_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party6|}}} | –[[{{{party6}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party6_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party6_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>{{Documentation|Template:Officeholder table/doc}} [[Category:Table templates]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly><!-- -->{{#if: {{{party|}}} | [[{{{party}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party2|}}} | –[[{{{party2}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party2_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party2_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party3|}}} | –[[{{{party3}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party3_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party3_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party4|}}} | –[[{{{party4}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party4_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party4_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party5|}}} | –[[{{{party5}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party5_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party5_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party6|}}} | –[[{{{party6}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party6_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party6_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>{{Documentation|Template:Officeholder table/doc}} [[Category:Table templates]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<includeonly><!-- -->{{#if: {{{party|}}} | [[{{{party}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party2|}}} | –[[{{{party2}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party2_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party2_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party3|}}} | –[[{{{party3}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party3_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party3_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party4|}}} | –[[{{{party4}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party4_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party4_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party5|}}} | –[[{{{party5}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party5_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party5_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party6|}}} | –[[{{{party6}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6}}}|abbrev}}]] }}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{party6_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party6_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>{{Documentation|Template:Officeholder table/doc}} [[Category:Table templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{{party|}}} | [[{{{party}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party}}}|abbrev}}]] }}{{#if: {{{party_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}{{#if: {{{party2|}}} | –[[{{{party2}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2}}}|abbrev}}]] }}{{#if: {{{party2_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party2_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party2_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}{{#if: {{{party3|}}} | –[[{{{party3}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3}}}|abbrev}}]] }}{{#if: {{{party3_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party3_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party3_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}{{#if: {{{party4|}}} | –[[{{{party4}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4}}}|abbrev}}]] }}{{#if: {{{party4_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party4_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party4_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}{{#if: {{{party5|}}} | –[[{{{party5}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5}}}|abbrev}}]] }}{{#if: {{{party5_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party5_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party5_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}{{#if: {{{party6|}}} | –[[{{{party6}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6}}}|abbrev}}]] }}{{#if: {{{party6_alt|}}} | /[[{{{party6_alt}}}|{{#invoke:Political party|fetch|{{{party6_alt}}}|abbrev}}]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>{{Documentation|Template:Officeholder table/doc}} [[Category:Table templates]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
